PowerShell("=== node/npm ==="; \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if \(\(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\) { node --version } else { "node NOT FOUND" }; "=== winget ==="; \(Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; "=== gh CLI ==="; \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; "=== vercel CLI ==="; \(Get-Command vercel -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell($env:Path = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path", "Machine"\) + ";" + [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path", "User"\); \(Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; git --version; gh --version 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 1)

PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit', '-Command', "& { Write-Host '=== GITHUB LOGIN ===' -ForegroundColor Cyan; Write-Host 'Press Enter, copy the code shown, then paste it in the browser' -ForegroundColor Yellow; Write-Host ''; gh auth login --hostname github.com --git-protocol https --web; Write-Host ''; Write-Host 'Done! You can close this window.' -ForegroundColor Green }")

PowerShell($env:Path = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path", "Machine"\) + ";" + [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path", "User"\); $cfg = "$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Roaming\\GitHub CLI\\hosts.yml"; "Looking for: $cfg"; if \(Test-Path $cfg\) { "EXISTS - content:"; Get-Content $cfg } else { "NOT FOUND" }; "---"; "Trying alt path:"; $cfg2 = "$env:APPDATA\\GitHub CLI\\hosts.yml"; if \(Test-Path $cfg2\) { "EXISTS - content:"; Get-Content $cfg2 } else { "NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell($env:Path = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path", "Machine"\) + ";" + [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path", "User"\); $tokenFile = "c:\\Users\\ASUS A16\\Desktop\\token.txt"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $tokenFile\)\) { "ERROR: token.txt not found at $tokenFile"; exit 1 }; $token = \(Get-Content $tokenFile -Raw\).Trim\(\); "Token length: $\($token.Length\) chars \(starts with: $\($token.Substring\(0,4\)\)...\)"; $token | & "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" auth login --hostname github.com --git-protocol https --with-token; "---"; & "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" auth status)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "https://api.github.com/repos/sirinaka168-tech/test03/contents" -ErrorAction Stop; "=== Files in repo ==="; $r | ForEach-Object { "  - $\($_.name\) \($\($_.size\) bytes\)" } } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; "---"; try { $branches = Invoke-RestMethod "https://api.github.com/repos/sirinaka168-tech/test03/branches" -ErrorAction Stop; "=== Branches ==="; $branches | ForEach-Object { "  - $\($_.name\)" } } catch { "No branches \(empty repo\)" })

PowerShell("=== Check gh config dirs ==="; @\("$env:APPDATA\\GitHub CLI", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\GitHub CLI", "$env:USERPROFILE\\.config\\gh"\) | ForEach-Object { if \(Test-Path $_\) { "$_ EXISTS:"; Get-ChildItem $_ -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { "  $\($_.FullName\) \($\($_.Length\) bytes\)" } } else { "$_ NOT FOUND" } }; "---"; "=== keyring/credential ==="; cmdkey /list:git:https://github.com 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $clientId = "178c6fc778ccc68e1d6a"; $info = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\gh-device-flow.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $deviceCode = $info.device_code; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://github.com/login/oauth/access_token" -Method Post -Body @{ client_id = $clientId; device_code = $deviceCode; grant_type = "urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:device_code" } -Headers @{ "Accept" = "application/json" }; if \($r.access_token\) { $r.access_token | Out-File "$env:TEMP\\gh-token.txt" -Encoding utf8 -NoNewline; "OK - token obtained \(length: $\($r.access_token.Length\)\)"; "Scopes: $\($r.scope\)" } else { "STATUS: $\($r.error\) - $\($r.error_description\)" } } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
